About Language Academy

Bangladesh's Best PTE & IELTS Coaching Centre in Dhaka

Language Academy is a modern, premium coaching centre specializing in PTE Academic preparation — plus IELTS, Spoken English, and study abroad consulting. We offer both online and offline classes from our Dhanmondi campus in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

Our Mission

To be Bangladesh's best PTE coaching centre — providing world-class PTE Academic, IELTS, and Spoken English training through expert instructors, AI-powered mock tests, and personalized coaching that helps every student achieve their target score.

Our Vision

To be the premier gateway for international education and global career opportunities by breaking down language barriers and fostering confident, articulate global citizens.

Unlimited
AI Mocks & Labs
Certified
Instructors
Guaranteed
Score Improvement
Premium
Facilities
Our Values

The principles that guide everything we do.

Academic Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest global standards of teaching quality and student outcomes.

Student-First Approach

Every decision we make prioritizes student success, comfort, and interactive growth.

Innovation

We embrace AI, data analytics, and modern pedagogy to keep our students ahead.

Integrity & Trust

Transparent pricing, honest guidance, and genuine care for every student walking through our doors.

Modern Facilities

Smart classrooms and computer labs designed specifically for focused PTE and IELTS training.

Continuous Improvement

We constantly refine our methods based on the latest exam patterns and algorithms.

The Modern Approach

International standards meets expert guidance.

01

Cutting-Edge AI Technology

Our platform uses AI to evaluate your mock tests instantly, giving you precise, actionable feedback designed to improve your PTE and IELTS scores fast.

02

Personalized Study Pipelines

No generic templates here. Every student receives tailored feedback, weak-point identification, and customized practice routines.

03

World-Class Ambience

Enjoy interactive smart classrooms, a dedicated computer lab for mock tests, and a student lounge to study in comfortable, focused environments.

Our Campuses

Modern learning spaces designed for focus and growth.

Dhanmondi Campus (Head Office)

Premium English Coaching

Bangladesh's best PTE coaching centre. Expert-led PTE Academic preparation, IELTS coaching, and Spoken English courses in Dhaka — available both online and offline. AI-scored mock tests and small-batch classes for guaranteed score improvement.
